creator: koie@suri.co.jp
text:
I introduce pbi-manager-0.9.1, and
 pbi_add --rArch amd64 --repo 001 -r Firefox
 pbi_add --rArch amd64 --repo 001 -r OpenOffice

Firfox and openoffice.org work fine.
But, "pbi_add --rArch amd64 --repo 001 -r OpenOffice" and "pbi_info -v" output
some buggy message like this:
usage: tr [-Ccsu] string1 string2
       tr [-Ccu] -d string1
       tr [-Ccu] -s string1
       tr [-Ccu] -ds string1 string2

Fix: It seems quotation problem.


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: % pbi_info -v
usage: tr [-Ccsu] string1 string2                     <<<< HERE
       tr [-Ccu] -d string1
       tr [-Ccu] -s string1
       tr [-Ccu] -ds string1 string2
PBI Information for: -3.3.0-amd64                     <<<< HERE
